allow: Bash(node -e "const fs = require\(''fs''\); const code = fs.readFileSync\(''js/analyzer-ui.js'', ''utf8''\); try { new Function\(code\); console.log\(''JS syntax OK''\); } catch\(e\) { console.error\(''SYNTAX ERROR:'', e.message\); }")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\(''fs''\); const css=fs.readFileSync\(''css/trueprice.css'',''utf8''\); const open=css.split\(''{''\).length; const close=css.split\(''}''\).length; console.log\(''trueprice.css braces: open=''+open+'' close=''+close+\(open===close?'' BALANCED'':'' UNBALANCED''\)\)")
